description_long: This is a porcelain teapot with a rounded body and two prominent, curved handles on either side, finished in a brown glaze. The teapot features a matching lid with a looped handle at the top, also glazed in brown, and a subtle, organic form. The surface is adorned with a delicate, watercolor-like floral pattern in soft greens, pinks, and yellows, giving it an antique or vintage appearance. The handles and lid knob are thick and robust, providing both decorative flair and practical grip. The teapot's body is slightly bulbous, tapering gently toward the base, and the lid fits snugly within a recessed rim. There is no visible spout, suggesting this may be a sugar bowl or a teapot with an unusually concealed spout.
description: A rounded porcelain teapot with brown-glazed handles and lid, decorated with soft floral patterns in pastel hues. The design is vintage and elegant, with a looped lid handle and no visible spout.
description_view_0: Front view showing both curved brown handles and the looped lid handle, with floral patterns visible on the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one handle in profile and the lid's looped handle, with the floral pattern partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing both handles and the lid handle, with more of the floral pattern visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, focusing on the other handle and the lid's looped handle, with less floral pattern visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: No visible spout; if present, it is concealed or integrated into the body.
attribute_handle_design: Two thick, curved handles attached symmetrically on opposite sides, finished in brown glaze with a robust, rounded form.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a looped handle, fits snugly within a recessed rim.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Watercolor-like floral patterns in green, pink, and yellow, softly blended on the white body.
